title: [NES+VRC6 Remix] - Super Mario 64 - Wing Cap Theme
description:
That secret "Wing Mario Over the Rainbow" level is such a pain in the ass to complete.

Title: Super Mario 64 - Wing Cap Theme
Original composer: Koji Kondo
Cover by: Daniel "Kuhneghetz" Ohlsson
Tracker used: FamiTracker
Sound-Chip used: RP2A03 (Nes NTSC), VRC6

A playable NSF of this song can be downloaded here:
https://mega.nz/file/hlRUUKTa#-5tTc9ylsnR-dm8bbdrZZlVk3CATHwUbEKq_yRMtpQM
